title: xyris malmeana
intro: Xyris malmeana, also known as the Malme's yellow-eyed grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xyris malmeana include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used to create a poultice or salve for topical application.
